top_signals.title: US and Iran exchange fresh strikes in battle over Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Trump claims waterway is open while Tehran says it will remain closed until ‘further notice’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Zelenskyy dismisses Ukraine’s PM in cabinet shake-up
top_signals.summary: Yulia Svyrydenko to exit as president announces sweeping government changes less than a year since last reshuffle
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Qatar’s Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa al-Thani dies aged 74
top_signals.summary: Former ruler was known for modernising gas-rich Gulf state and pursuing regional dialogue rather than confrontation

top_signals.title: Reeves makes last-minute pitch for senior job under Burnham
top_signals.summary: Chancellor will say in Mansion House speech on Tuesday that she has left the economy in a good state for incoming PM
